rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes with valid feature references
Use assume/guarantee syntax with proper labeling and expression formatting
generic_rules: Use eq declarations for boolean range checks with visible identifiers
Place implementation-level assignments in implementation scopes only
Declare constants with correct AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Guarantees must reference visible variables or declared equations
Assignments must target existing output features or auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
